situational_context: Running comeback week 10 (14 runs since May 3, 64 days in). Pattern of distance overshoots persists: Run #12 (Jun 21) 7.5 km/suffer 36, Run #14 (Jul 5) 6 km/suffer 30 — both vs 4 km targets. Controlled run between: Run #13 (Jun 28) 3.5 km/suffer 13. ACWR normalized to 0.96 (from 1.35 at last state Jun 14). HRV weekly recovering: 37 ms (from 34-35 in late June). VO2max running 41.5 (up from 40.6). Weight 103.67 kg (single Jun 21 reading — no recent Withings data). Training status oscillating Detraining/Maintaining due to irregular session spacing. Heat wave in Paris this week (35-38C) constrains outdoor sessions. Travel to Saint-Malo Jul 12 (vacation start). Baby Leonie 18 months. Vitamin D retest overdue (last 27 ng/mL Dec 2025, target 40+). E-bike commuting on sur site days provides light aerobic base (~14 load per round trip).

recommendations.text: DISCIPLINE DE DISTANCE : Run #12 (7.5 km) et Run #14 (6 km) ont depasse les cibles de 50-90%. A 103.67 kg, chaque depassement augmente le risque tendineux cumulatif (Achille, rotulien, fascia plantaire). ACTIVER ALARME GPS a 1.5 km pour forcer le demi-tour. Run #15 = 3 km MAX, pas un metre de plus.

PROTOCOLE CANICULE : 35-38C toute la semaine a Paris. Sessions exterieures 11h-15h = pic de chaleur. Hydratation >= 750 mL eau + electrolytes par session. Raccourcir de 20% si temperature ressentie > 36C. Casquette/bandana humide. Arret immediat si nausee, confusion ou arret de sudation.
recommendations.measurable: Hydratation >= 750 mL par session, aucun signe de coup de chaleur

recommendations.text: BILAN VITAMINE D : Retest prevu juillet 2026 non encore realise (dernier 27 ng/mL dec 2025 = insuffisant). Risque stress fracture 2x sous 40 ng/mL (Burgi 2011). Programmer prise de sang avant fin juillet.
recommendations.measurable: Prise de sang programmee avant 31 juillet 2026

markers_to_watch.reason: 2 of last 3 runs exceeded plan by 50-90%. Pattern must break to protect tissue tolerance at 103.67 kg.

markers_to_watch.threshold: RHR elevated > 3 bpm above 49 avg OR HRV drop > 10% from 37 during heat wave
markers_to_watch.reason: 35-38C heat wave. Heat stress compounds training stress and impairs recovery.

markers_to_watch.threshold: No lab result by end July 2026
markers_to_watch.reason: Last 27 ng/mL (Dec 2025) = insufficient for bone/tendon health during running comeback. Active supplementation needs confirmation.
